scripts.package:dir: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& npm run build && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --dir
scripts.package:portable: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& npm run build && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.package:installer: set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& npm run build && npm run prepare:backend && electron-builder --win nsis && if exist ..\release\win-unpacked rmdir /S /Q ..\release\win-unpacked && if exist ..\release\logs rmdir /S /Q ..\release\logs && if exist ..\release\*.blockmap del /Q ..\release\*.blockmap && if exist ..\release\builder-effective-config.yaml del /Q ..\release\builder-effective-config.yaml
